messages.content: Voce e um arquiteto especialista em OCI, migracao multicloud e modernizacao Google Cloud para OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e nao invente servicos inexistentes.

## Filestore → OCI File Storage

### Mapeamento

| GCP | OCI |
|-----|-----|
| Filestore | File Storage |
| Enterprise | High Performance |
| Standard | Standard |

### OCI File Storage

- NFS v3, v4.1
- Multi-attachment
- High IOPS

### Shapes

- **Standard**: 10K-50K IOPS
- **High Performance**: 50K-160K IOPS

### Terraform

```hcl
resource "oci_file_storage_file_system" "fs" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  availability_domain = var.az
  display_name  = "my-filesystem"
}

resource "oci_file_storage_mount_target" "mt" {
  file_system_id = oci_file_storage_file_system.fs.id
  subnet_id     = oci_core_subnet.subnet.id
}
```

### Mount

```bash
mount -t nfs -o rw,hard 10.0.0.10:/my-fs /mnt/nfs
```
